case_title: SASHA BAYAN KHADIVIAN VS. GETAROUND, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: SERVED VARAVAY BUNTON, WORK PLACE COORDINATOR, ON BEHALF OF GETAROUND, INC. SERVED JUL-09-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-24-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-22-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BRANDON POWELL, MANAGER ESCALATIONS & SERVICE RECOVERY FILED BY DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCT-12-2021 AT 3:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,720.00 FILED BY KHADIVIAN, SASHA BAYAN AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-12-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SASHA BAYAN KHADIVIAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GETAROUND INC, REPRESENTED BY BRANDON POWELL, MANAGER ESCALATIONS SERVICE RECOVERY IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF IS BOUND BY THE DEFENDANT'S SERVICE TERMS AND AGREEMENT TO GO ARBITRATION WHEN THERE IS ANY MONETARY DISPUTE. AT THE TIME OF PLAINTIFF'S CONTRACT WITH DEFENDANT, THE ARBITRATION WAS HANDLED BY THE AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION (AAA). THE COURT ORDERS THE PARTIES TO MAKE GOOD FAITH EFFORTS WITHIN A WEEK FROM TODAY'S COURT DATE TO SCHEDULE A DATE WITH AAA. IF EITHER SIDE FAILS TO ACT IN GOOD FAITH TO GO TO AAA, THE COURT WILL CONSIDER PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND PROCEED TO HEARING. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
